pr.title: feat: Newsroom dashboard, Columnist role, image uploads, seed data & enhanced admin
pr.body:
## Summary

Major enhancement of the Bulletins system into a full **Newsroom** platform, plus a new **Columnist** role, image support for articles, expanded news categories, a congregation data seed script, and admin dashboard improvements.

### Columnist Role & Auth
- New `requireBulletinEditor` helper in `adminAuth.ts` — allows **Administrator** OR **Columnist** role to manage all bulletin/newsroom operations
- `AdminGuard` updated to grant `/admin` access to both Administrator and Columnist roles
- `AdminDashboard` conditionally renders tabs: Columnists see only the **Newsroom** tab, Admins see everything (Overview, Directory, Newsroom)
- All bulletin mutations (`create`, `update`, `remove`, flyer operations) now use `requireBulletinEditor` instead of `requireAdministrator`

### Bulletin Schema Expansion
- Added `imageStorageId` (optional) — each article can have a cover/hero image stored in Convex file storage
- Added `authorId` — tracks which user created the article
- New categories: `national`, `crypto`, `broadcast`, `community` (in addition to existing `general`, `events`, `service`)
- New indexes: `by_category`, `by_author`

### Admin BulletinsTab Revamp
- Image upload: drag-and-drop or click-to-upload cover images (5 MB limit, client-side validation)
- Category filter bar with counts
- Card-based grid layout (replaces old list view) — shows image previews, author name, category badges
- Remove image action per article
- All 7 categories available in the article editor

### Public Bulletin Page — Newsstand Redesign
- Category filter tabs with icons (All, General, Events, Worship, National, Crypto, Broadcasts, Community)
- Magazine-style responsive grid: featured article spans 2 columns with large image
- Image-rich article cards with hover effects, gradient overlays, author attribution
- Mobile-first layout — all filters and cards stack cleanly on small screens
- "The source of truth for the nation" branding

### Seed Script (`convex/seed.ts`)
- `seedAll` internal mutation populates realistic congregation data:
  - 4 roles (Administrator, Columnist, Soldier, Visitor)
  - 5 zones (Jerusalem, Samaria, Judea, Galilee, Diaspora)
  - 7 departments (Youth Ministry, Music & Worship, Education, Hospitality, Media, Outreach, Finance)
  - 32 members with Hebrew names, ranks, zone/department assignments, varied join dates
  - 120 donations across 12 months (one-time, weekly, monthly; various funds)
  - 12 bulletins across all categories (crypto news, national updates, broadcasts, events, community)
- Idempotent: skips existing records (checks by email/name)
- Run via: `npx convex run seed:seedAll`

### Admin Dashboard Enhancement
- `OverviewStatsCards` redesigned: 4-column card layout with colored icons (Users, Wallet, Calendar, TrendingUp)
- New metrics: Active Donors count, average donation per donor
- Hover effect on stat cards

## Review & Testing Checklist for Human
- [ ] **Columnist role flow**: Create a "Columnist" role in Convex (or run seed), assign it to a test user, verify they can access `/admin` and see ONLY the Newsroom tab — not Overview or Directory
- [ ] **Image upload**: Create a new article with a cover image, verify it displays in both the admin card grid and the public `/bulletin` page
- [ ] **Category filters**: On the public bulletin page, click category tabs and verify filtering works correctly
- [ ] **Seed script**: Run `npx convex run seed:seedAll` on your dev deployment and verify members, donations, and bulletins populate correctly in the admin dashboard
- [ ] **Mobile responsiveness**: Check the public bulletin newsstand page on a phone-sized viewport — category tabs should wrap, cards should stack single-column

### Notes
- The seed script uses `clerkUserId: "seed_<email>"` for generated users — these won't match real Clerk accounts but will populate the admin dashboard with realistic data for demonstration
- Existing bulletins are preserved; seed only runs if there are fewer than 5 bulletins and 20 donations
- The `requireAdministrator` import in `convex/bulletins.ts` is removed (replaced by `requireBulletinEditor`), but `requireAdministrator` remains available for other admin-only operations
- **Important**: After merging, run `npx convex deploy` to push the schema and function changes to your Convex production backend

Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/0a8f38d55ce2431ab17ad9708b8c14a3
Requested by: @elbitapmoC
pr.author: devin-ai-integration[bot]
